demo_timestamps.description: Simulation of the European Digital Product Passport (DPP) system integration in BIM workflow
Demonstration of the DPP system and its applicability across different construction phases, including a human-readable and machine-readable form of product passports.

themes: Digital Product Passport (DPP) system and its integration into building information modeling for sustainability

client_mentions.name: buildingSMART Portugal
client_mentions.context: Inclusion of the power meter in their dictionary version in Portuguese

summary: The video explores the upcoming European Digital Product Passport (DPP) system and its potential to transform BIM workflows by integrating comprehensive sustainability data into building management processes. It highlights the significance of compliance with European Union sustainability regulations and the United Nations’ Sustainability Goals, demonstrating how the DPP system can be accessed with any software throughout various construction phases.
